_source: RESEARCH 'Strict 12x1L Matcher' fixtures list: 'an offer saying Kasten with no explicit per-bottle size'. German offers sometimes list 'Kasten' without the '12 x 1 l' token; size is ambiguous and there is no contradicting disqualifier -> needsReview (D-08), not dropped.
description: Coca-Cola Kasten versch. Sorten zzgl. Pfand 9,99 €
